name: commerce/acp-delegated-payment
description: Conformance vectors for fromACPDelegatedPaymentObservation in @peac/mappings-acp. Validates the mapper-boundary finality-synthesis guard applied to ACP delegated-payment observations across the closed observed_payment_state enum and across strictness modes.
invariants: pending, failed, and revoked observed states MUST NOT emit a commerce event.
Strict mode rejects missing or UNKNOWN currency and out-of-enum env.
Interop mode warns on the same conditions but does not throw.
Legacy mode is silent on rules 2 and 3.
Token material is NEVER carried; only payment_method_token_ref is preserved.
Raw upstream_artifact is preserved verbatim under proofs.acp.delegated_payment.upstream_artifact.
